title: Introduction to Web Development
description: Master the fundamentals of web development. This course covers HTML, CSS, and JavaScript from the ground up, empowering you to build your first interactive websites.

title: Data Science with Python
description: Dive into the world of data science. Learn to analyze data, create beautiful visualizations, and build predictive models using popular Python libraries like Pandas and Scikit-learn.

title: Digital Marketing Essentials
description: Learn the core strategies of digital marketing. This course covers SEO, content marketing, social media, and analytics to help you grow your online presence.

title: UX Design: From Wireframe to Prototype
description: Understand the principles of user experience design. Learn how to conduct user research, create wireframes, and build interactive prototypes for web and mobile apps.

title: Agile Project Management
description: Master the Agile and Scrum frameworks for effective project management. Learn to lead teams, manage backlogs, and deliver value to stakeholders efficiently.
